Class RefinementTests.AbsRefPart

Direct Known Subclasses:

  • Method Details

    • process

      public void process(IInternalElement refinedRoot, IInternalElement abstractRoot, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Description copied from interface: IRefinementParticipant
      Modifies the given target root in order to make it (partially or entirely) a refinement of the given source root. The source root is not modified by this operation.
      Specified by:
      process in interface IRefinementParticipant
      Parameters:
      refinedRoot - the target root
      abstractRoot - the source of the refinement
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null
